case_title: RHOADES, GLORIA VS THE CITY TOW

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RHOADES, GLORIA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT THE CITY TOW STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
